TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-baditoh, title = nipaluma-baditoh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-baditoh} }

S.FORM: == baditoh == šĻĚÁĮÄŤĆ∂ u siwkay nu lalidec i Taywan sabul, i apuyu' i teban nu takalaw-bayu' 420m-1500m a kilangkilangan, matepa ku uzip tina lutuk. yadah i Yilan, i Nantou, i Pintong atu i Lanyu. u nu sapayu' a sasahicaan sa, akenek ku sanek, ahemaw ku ledek. kapah tu nu ukak, sapawazay tu walak. kapah tu malebawa. kapah tu banic. kapah tu tusuz. yadah a mihca a kilang. sawsawni landaway a kilang. tabaki a kilang u takalaw sa 1.5m. yadah ku ciid. tanaya' nu papah 5-15cm. ahbal nu papah 3-6cm. sibalu i lalud. u ahemaway a takuliway-landaway a kulit. u heci sa, mulu. u landway i adidi' henay, tabaki tu sa mala kibetulay a sumanahay. cayhenay paluma' tu tadamaw. hali melalemet a liwliw. mauzip i pilis. maupzip i helun nu buyu. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika u sulit nu Hulam u zuma a ngangan nu Hulam: . u sulit nu Lipun „āĽ„É≥„É™„Éß„ā¶(šĽôŤďľÔľŹŚćÉšł°,Sarcandra glabra(Thunb.) Nakai) . u sulit nu Amilika Sarcandra glabra is an herb native to Southeast Asia. It is also known as herba sarcandrae or glabrous sarcandra herb. Aromatic oils may be extracted from the leaves. The entire plant has anti-stress, antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, detoxifying, blood activating, and anti-bacterial
S.PHON: == baditońß == *** u siwkaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺid…ô ¶ i tajwan sabur~…ĺ, i apuju Ē~ ° i t…ôban nu takar~…ĺaw-baju Ē~ ° ***m-****m a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, mat…ôpa ku uzip tina r~…ĺutuk. jadańß i jir~…ĺan, i nantou, i pintoŇč atu i r~…ĺanju. u nu sapaju Ē~ ° a sasańßi ¶aan sa, ak…ôn…ôk ku san…ôk, ańß…ômaw ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk. kapańß tu nu ukak, sapawazaj tu war~…ĺak. kapańß tu mar~…ĺ…ôbawa. kapańß tu bani ¶. kapańß tu tusuz. jadańß a mińß ¶a a kir~…ĺaŇč. sawsawni r~…ĺandawaj a kir~…ĺaŇč. tabaki a kir~…ĺaŇč u takar~…ĺaw sa *.*m. jadańß ku ¶iid. tanaja Ē~ ° nu papańß *-** ¶m. ańßbar~…ĺ nu papańß *-* ¶m. sibar~…ĺu i r~…ĺar~…ĺud. u ańß…ômawaj a takur~…ĺiwaj-r~…ĺandawaj a kur~…ĺit. u ńß…ô ¶i sa, mur~…ĺu. u r~…ĺandwaj i adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj, tabaki tu sa mar~…ĺa kib…ôtur~…ĺaj a sumanańßaj. ¶ajńß…ônaj par~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu tadamaw. ńßar~…ĺi m…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôt a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw. mauzip i pir~…ĺis. maupzip i ńß…ôr~…ĺun nu buju. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam u zuma a ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam: . u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun *****(*****,sar ¶andra gr~…ĺabra(tńßunb.) nakai) . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika sar ¶andra gr~…ĺabra is an ńß…ôrb nati*…ô to soutńß…ôast asia. it is ar~…ĺso known as ńß…ôrba sar ¶andra…ô or gr~…ĺabrous sar ¶andra ńß…ôrb. aromati ¶ oir~…ĺs maj b…ô …ô*tra ¶t…ôd from tńß…ô r~…ĺ…ôa*…ôs. tńß…ô …ôntir…ô pr~…ĺant ńßas anti-str…ôss, antio*idant, anti-infr~…ĺammatorj, d…ôto*ifjiŇč, br~…ĺood a ¶ti*atiŇč, and anti-ba ¶t…ôriar~…ĺ
S.FORM: == baditoh == šĻĚÁĮÄŤĆ∂ u siwkay nu lalidec i Taywan sabul, i apuyu' i teban nu takalaw-bayu' 420m-1500m a kilangkilangan, matepa ku uzip tina lutuk. yadah i Yilan, i Nantou, i Pintong atu i Lanyu. u nu sapayu' a sasahicaan sa, akenek ku sanek, ahemaw ku ledek. kapah tu nu ukak, sapawazay tu walak. kapah tu malebawa. kapah tu banic. kapah tu tusuz. yadah a mihca a kilang. sawsawni landaway a kilang. tabaki a kilang u takalaw sa 1.5m. yadah ku ciid. tanaya' nu papah 5-15cm. ahbal nu papah 3-6cm. sibalu i lalud. u ahemaway a takuliway-landaway a kulit. u heci sa, mulu. u landway i adidi' henay, tabaki tu sa mala kibetulay a sumanahay. cayhenay paluma' tu tadamaw. hali melalemet a liwliw. mauzip i pilis. maupzip i helun nu buyu. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika u sulit nu Hulam u zuma a ngangan nu Hulam: . u sulit nu Lipun „āĽ„É≥„É™„Éß„ā¶(šĽôŤďľÔľŹŚćÉšł°,Sarcandra glabra(Thunb.) Nakai) . u sulit nu Amilika Sarcandra glabra is an herb native to Southeast Asia. It is also known as herba sarcandrae or glabrous sarcandra herb. Aromatic oils may be extracted from the leaves. The entire plant has anti-stress, antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, detoxifying, blood activating, and anti-bacterial
S.PHON: == baditońß == *** u siwkaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺid…ô ¶ i tajwan sabur~…ĺ, i apuju Ē~ ° i t…ôban nu takar~…ĺaw-baju Ē~ ° ***m-****m a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, mat…ôpa ku uzip tina r~…ĺutuk. jadańß i jir~…ĺan, i nantou, i pintoŇč atu i r~…ĺanju. u nu sapaju Ē~ ° a sasańßi ¶aan sa, ak…ôn…ôk ku san…ôk, ańß…ômaw ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk. kapańß tu nu ukak, sapawazaj tu war~…ĺak. kapańß tu mar~…ĺ…ôbawa. kapańß tu bani ¶. kapańß tu tusuz. jadańß a mińß ¶a a kir~…ĺaŇč. sawsawni r~…ĺandawaj a kir~…ĺaŇč. tabaki a kir~…ĺaŇč u takar~…ĺaw sa *.*m. jadańß ku ¶iid. tanaja Ē~ ° nu papańß *-** ¶m. ańßbar~…ĺ nu papańß *-* ¶m. sibar~…ĺu i r~…ĺar~…ĺud. u ańß…ômawaj a takur~…ĺiwaj-r~…ĺandawaj a kur~…ĺit. u ńß…ô ¶i sa, mur~…ĺu. u r~…ĺandwaj i adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj, tabaki tu sa mar~…ĺa kib…ôtur~…ĺaj a sumanańßaj. ¶ajńß…ônaj par~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu tadamaw. ńßar~…ĺi m…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôt a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw. mauzip i pir~…ĺis. maupzip i ńß…ôr~…ĺun nu buju. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam u zuma a ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam: . u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun *****(*****,sar ¶andra gr~…ĺabra(tńßunb.) nakai) . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika sar ¶andra gr~…ĺabra is an ńß…ôrb nati*…ô to soutńß…ôast asia. it is ar~…ĺso known as ńß…ôrba sar ¶andra…ô or gr~…ĺabrous sar ¶andra ńß…ôrb. aromati ¶ oir~…ĺs maj b…ô …ô*tra ¶t…ôd from tńß…ô r~…ĺ…ôa*…ôs. tńß…ô …ôntir…ô pr~…ĺant ńßas anti-str…ôss, antio*idant, anti-infr~…ĺammatorj, d…ôto*ifjiŇč, br~…ĺood a ¶ti*atiŇč, and anti-ba ¶t…ôriar~…ĺ
